title: Change Management Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Change Management skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

defined_change_scope.description: Defined change scope: description of what is changing, why, and what the future state looks like

stakeholder_inventory_list.description: Stakeholder inventory: list of affected populations segmented by role, location, or function

timeline_key_milestones.description: Timeline and key milestones for the change initiative

organizational_readiness_data.description: Organizational readiness data: baseline survey or interview findings on employee confidence and awareness

prior_change_history.description: Prior change history at the organization and lessons learned from previous initiatives

existing_communication_channels.description: Existing communication channels and their reach and credibility with affected populations

hr_line_manager.description: HR or line manager capacity available to support the change effort
